symptom_vector: Node memory exhaustion, saturation, high memory usage, leak, or stress.

reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [aiops-k8s-07] (From Ground Truth).
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [node_memory_usage_rate] in [Metric] (From GT key_observations). The metric name is listed in the available_metric_names from the Full Context.
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes] in [Metric] (From GT key_observations). The metric name is listed in the available_metric_names from the Full Context.
Step 4: Derive Root Cause - Based on the presence of the key memory-related observation keywords for the specified node, determined the cause is [node_memory_usage_rate] (From Ground Truth).

critical_checks.expected_pattern: The metric value for node 'aiops-k8s-07' is abnormally high (approaching or at 100%) during the fault time window.
critical_checks.instruction: Search for metric [node_memory_usage_rate] for node [aiops-k8s-07] and check if its value exceeds a critical threshold (e.g., >90%).

critical_checks.expected_pattern: The metric value for node 'aiops-k8s-07' is abnormally low during the fault time window.
critical_checks.instruction: Search for metric [node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes] for node [aiops-k8s-07] and check if its value is critically low.
